apihelp-query+imageforpage-summary: Waxay hore u samaysaa oo bixisaa URL-yada sawirrada ee bog gaar ah oo ku jira meel magac "Bogga:".
apihelp-query+imageforpage-param-prop: Noocyada sawirrada ama sifooyinka sawirrada ee la soo celinayo ee bog gaar ah oo ku jira meel magac "Bogga:".
apihelp-query+imageforpage-paramvalue-pr: Soo celi magaca faylka ee la xiriira bogga la weydiinayo
Soo celi cabbirka sawirka ee la xiriira bogga la weydiinayo
Soo celi URL-ka sawirka buuxa ee la xiriira bogga la weydiinayo
Soo celi liis ka kooban URL-yada sawirrada ee 1x, 1.5x iyo 2x ee sawirka buuxa ee la xiriira bogga la weydiinayo
apierror-proofreadpage-invalidindex: Cinwaan index ah oo aan sax ahayn "$1".
apihelp-query+defaultcontentforpage-summ:
Waxay bixisaa waxa ku jira caadiga ah ee bog gaar ah oo ku jira meel magaca "Bogga:".

Waxa ku jira caadiga ahi waa wikitext ceeriin ah (oo laga yaabo inuu ku jiro HTML ceeriin oo ka yimid lakabyo qoraal buug aan la aamini karin). Waa in aan lagu isticmaalin HTML aan la sifeyn ama aan la fasirin!
apihelp-query+proofread-summary: Waxay soo celisaa macluumaad ku saabsan heerka hadda ee saxitaanka ee bogagga la siiyay.
apihelp-query+proofread-example-1: Soo celi heerka saxitaanka ee bogagga ku jira meel magac 250
apihelp-query+proofreadinfo-summary: Soo celi macluumaad ku saabsan habaynta kordhinta ProofreadPage.
apihelp-query+proofreadinfo-param-prop: Sifooyinka saxitaanka ee la rabo in la helo:
apihelp-query+proofreadinfo-paramvalue-p: Macluumaad ku saabsan meel magac "{{ns:Page}}" iyo "{{ns:Index}}".
apihelp-query+proofreadpagesinindex-summ: Liiska bogagga ku jira index la siiyay
apihelp-query+proofreadpagesinindex-para: Xaddid tirada bogagga la soo celinayo
Aqoonsiga bogga ee bogga tusmada ee laga soo saarayo bogagga
Sifooyinka la rabo in laga helo bog kasta
Soo celi aqoonsiga bogga ee bog kasta oo ku xiran bogga tusmada
Soo celi cinwaanka bogga ee bog kasta oo ku xiran bogga tusmada
Soo celi aqoonsiga bogga ee bog kasta oo ku xiran bogga tusmada
Soo celi aqoonsiga bogga ee bog kasta oo ku xiran bogga tusmada
Soo celi lambarrada bogagga ee qaabaysan ee bog kasta oo ku xiran bogga tusmada. Waa la joojiyay, isticmaal "formattedpagenumber" beddelkeeda.
Cinwaanka bogga tusmada ee laga helayo bogagga
